arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney reveals big Man Utd worry as he sends blunt Marcus Rashford transfer message
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has rediscovered some form on loan at Aston Villa but Manchester United still have the option of reintegrating the forward into their squad next season

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher's brutal Man Utd dig after embarrassing Champions League error
arts.sum: Manchester United are not playing in the Champions League this season, but even so they have caught the ire of Liverpool legend Jamie Carragher during the second legs of this year's quarter-finals

arts.ttl: Sir Alex eyed Barry Ferguson to replace Roy Keane at Man Utd as ex Rangers boss reveals telling phone call
arts.sum: Ferguson's drive and mentality caught the Old Trafford legend's attention - and it's the same characteristics that Alex McLeish reckon make him perfect for the Rangers job

arts.ttl: What Football Fans are Saying About Man United After Aston Villa 3-2 PSG
arts.sum: Supporters are all saying the same thing about the Red Devils after Villa's valiant effort and Rashford's role

arts.ttl: What Man Utd fans said about Marcus Rashford during Aston Villa vs PSG
arts.sum: ASTON VILLA 3-2 PSG (4-5 AGG): Marcus Rashford was picked to start the crucial Champions League tie by Unai Emery but suffered a frustrating game - although he did impress with one terrific assist

arts.ttl: Andre Onana's 'shock to the system' as Manchester United conversation comes to light
arts.sum: Man United goalkeeper Andre Onana faces an uncertain future at Old Trafford beyond this summer after several poor performances.

arts.ttl: Amorim must hit '€120m JACKPOT' to sign key Man Utd target
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim has reportedly been informed that he must win the Europa League in order to sign RB Leipzig attacking midfielder Xavi Simons this summer. Bayern Munich, Liverpool and Manchester City are also interested in signing Simons, however Man Utd are eager to finalise an agreement for the 21-year-old as they believe he is the perfect player to thrive in Amorim’s 3-4-3 system.

arts.ttl: Manchester United handed potential Ederson transfer boost after huge Atalanta appointment
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news and rumours including the latest on midfield transfer target Ederson

arts.ttl: Lyon winger Malick Fofana set to return for Europa League decider against Manchester United
arts.sum: Lyon have been provided a timely injury boost with Belgium international winger Malick Fofana (20) returning to team training this Tuesday, according to L’Equipe. The 20-year-old is expected to make…

arts.ttl: Man United could miss out on Antoine Semenyo transfer as Liverpool secret weapon emerges
arts.sum: Manchester United have been linked with a move for the Bournemouth forward, who is also attracting interest from Premier League rivals Liverpool
